evidence.description: During the 2022–2023 Woman, Life, Freedom protests, Reza Pahlavi emerged as one of the most visible exile voices, calling for civil disobedience and international support. He organized a rally on February 11, 2023, with 80,000+ attendees in Los Angeles. A Change.org petition for Pahlavi as representative reached 460,000+ signatures.

editorial_notes: Pahlavi was a leading exile voice during the Woman, Life, Freedom protests. Organized February 2023 rally in LA (80,000+). Petition reached 460,000+ signatures.
